text: In the first scene, I am overtaken by a sense of calm and contemplation; the emptiness and quiet corners beckon me inward, suggesting introspection. The minimalist space, with its bean bags and soft lighting, feels like an invitation to pause. In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and bold letters, I feel invigorated and curious. The presence of text and screens makes me reflect on knowledge and the ever-changing relationship between humans and technology. Being here, I sense both tranquility and a compelling urge to explore ideas.
